summary: test-tree run: rate-limit Redis migration, headless run

local.change_request: Migrate the rate-limit store from in-memory to Redis.
local.intent_analysis:
Ask: migration — replace in-memory rate-limit store with Redis.
Systems/files: rate-limit middleware, deployment config (REDIS_URL), tests around limits.
Constraints: per-key TTL semantics must match current behavior; failure-open on Redis outage; latency budget +5ms p99 max.
Codeowners: no CODEOWNERS file in repo.
Acceptance: Redis-backed limiter passes existing tests; soak test holds rate under burst; metrics show consistent allow/deny.
